headline: Lumentum Is the S&P 500’s Top Performer Today. Here’s Why.
summary: Lumentum Holdings  was among the hottest names in the artificial-intelligence trade at the start of the year.  After a couple rocky months, it is time to buy, according to Barclays.  The firm upgraded  Lumentum  shares to Overweight from Equal Weight and reiterated a price target of $1,000 in a research note Monday.

headline: Here’s How Much You Would Have Made Owning Corning Stock In The Last 10 Years
summary: Corning (NYSE:GLW) has outperformed the market over the past 10 years by 8.61% on an annualized basis producing an average annual return of 21.75%. Currently, Corning has a market capitalization of $133.45 billion.
